scripts.test-deployment-docs: node scripts/qa/test_incident_response_restriction_playbooks.js && node scripts/qa/test_governance_watchtower_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_key_hierarchy_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_restriction_schema_activation_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_stolen_funds_wallet_drill_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_scam_contract_quarantine_drill_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_code_hash_ban_drill_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_bridge_route_pause_drill_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_guardian_expiry_drill_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_false_positive_lift_drill_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_neo_developer_docs.js && node scripts/qa/test_neo_zk_proof_services_gate.js

scripts.prepare-wallet-extension-release: npm run validate-wallet-extension-release && npm run package-wallet-extension
